revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:地方長官]]
'''Regional Governor''' (地方長官, Chihō Chōkan)
* The head of a regional administrative office in {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}} before the enforcement of the {{ill|Constitution of Japan|en|Constitution of Japan|qid=Q237082|lt=Constitution of Japan|1=Constitution of Japan}} and the [[:en:en:Local Autonomy Law|en:Local Autonomy Law]] (May 3, 1947)<ref name=":0">{{Cite Kotobank|word=地方長官|accessdate=2020-05-09}}</ref>. This refers to the [[:en:Prefectural Governors of Japan|governors of prefectures]] (府県知事), the {{ill|Governor of Tokyo|en|Governor of Tokyo|qid=Q11525354|lt=Governor of Tokyo|1=Governor of Tokyo}} (東京都長官), and the [[:en:Governor of Hokkaido|Governor of Hokkaido]] (北海道庁長官)<ref name=":0" />. * The Japanese translation of {{enlink|Lord Lieutenant}}, the regional governor of {{ill|England|en|England|qid=Q21|lt=England|1=England}}. * {{ill|The Voyevoda (symphonic ballad)|en|The Voyevoda (symphonic ballad)|qid=Q3228320|lt=Regional Governor (Symphonic Ballad)|1=The Voyevoda (symphonic ballad)}} - An orchestral piece by {{ill|Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky|en|Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky|qid=Q7315|lt=Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky|1=Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky}}. Tchaikovsky also composed an opera with the same title.
